ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact and verification */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's physical address for compliance and verification */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's identity has been verified */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for age verification */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country for compliance and localization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "from_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the money */,
  "to_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the money */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money transferred */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction request was made */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was completed */,
  "time_passed" TEXT /* Time taken for the transaction to complete */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction status */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is refundable */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Transaction fee associated with the transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_user FOREIGN KEY ("from_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES transaction_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES transaction_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_user FOREIGN KEY ("to_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction request */,
  "from_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the request */,
  "to_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user intended to receive the request */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount requested to be sent */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was initiated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method intended to be used */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the requested transaction */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the request is for a refundable transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the request was initiated for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_requests_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_requests_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES transaction_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_requests_to_user FOREIGN KEY ("to_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_requests_from_user FOREIGN KEY ("from_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this profile */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for profile completeness */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender for demographic analysis */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location for community features */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* User's occupation for community and analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is directed */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction request related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the type of notification (e.g., transaction, request, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES transaction_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the audit log (if applicable) */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction request related to the audit log (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was initiated for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES transaction_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the payment method (e.g., bank info, card type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., currency type, transaction limits) */,
  "setting_group" TEXT /* Categorizes settings (e.g., financial, security, user interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with this audit */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the transaction */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_audit_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "from_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "to_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the message (if applicable) */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction request related to the message (if applicable) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_from_user FOREIGN KEY ("from_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES transaction_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_to_user FOREIGN KEY ("to_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
